name: Elephant Ears
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (less 2 tbsp) Sour milk or buttermilk
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour sour cream into a measuring cup.
2. Add sour milk or buttermilk to fill the cup.
3. Combine with egg, salt, and melted margarine in a large bowl.
4. Gradually mix in flour and baking soda until well combined.
5. Transfer dough to a floured surface and knead until smooth.
6. Let rest for 3 hours or refrigerate overnight.
7. Divide dough into serving pieces.
8. Roll each piece into a rectangle about 1/4 inch thick.
9. Cut parallel slits in the center to form ears.
10. Fry in hot oil until golden brown.
11. Dust with cinnamon and sugar.
Note: This recipe originally came from "Kentucky Cooking, Past and Present" and was featured in the 1984 HOME COOKING BOOK.
